seg.t: INCIDENT DATE: 2003.08.18. Occurrence report, Ottawa duty element, filed 2003.08.19.
, downtown Ottawa, 21:40 hrs. Interval, alert to arrival: four minutes. Subject (F, age indeterminate) secured without resistance, unconscious on arrival, transferred to
